help.advanced.adaptiveAi.content: The Adaptive AI engine detects your hardware at runtime — WebGPU, WebNN, DirectML, CPU cores, VRAM tier, and battery — and routes local inference to the fastest available backend. Enable it under 設定 → Early Access Features and inspect the live readout under 設定 → AI. Eco Mode picks the smallest viable model to save battery and memory, and a tab-leader election ensures only one browser tab uses the GPU at a time to avoid VRAM collisions.
help.advanced.adaptiveAi.title: アダプティブ AI、GPU、エコモード
help.advanced.cloudSync.content: Optional end-to-end encrypted sync keeps your library in step across devices using a Cloudflare R2 backend. Enable “Cloud sync” under 設定 → Early Access Features and configure it under 設定 → Connections. Project data is encrypted locally with AES-256-GCM before upload, and your AI API keys are never sent to the cloud. Sync is entirely opt-in; with it off, WorldScript remains a fully offline-first app.
help.advanced.cloudSync.title: クラウド同期
help.advanced.encryption.content: Protect every manuscript, snapshot, and setting stored on your device with AES-256-GCM encryption derived from a passphrase (PBKDF2, 600,000 iterations). Enable it under 設定 → Privacy & Security → “Encrypt project data at rest”. On the next launch an unlock dialog asks for your passphrase; you can change or disable it later from the same panel. Your passphrase never leaves the device and cannot be recovered — export an encrypted library backup before you experiment.
help.advanced.encryption.title: 保存時の暗号化
help.advanced.languages.content: WorldScript Studio ships in seven interface languages — German, English, French, Spanish, Italian, plus Arabic and Hebrew as a right-to-left (RTL) Beta. Switch language in 設定 → General, the ようこそ Portal, or the Command Palette. Selecting Arabic or Hebrew flips the whole interface to RTL and loads self-hosted Noto Sans Arabic/Hebrew fonts (with Noto Naskh Arabic for the manuscript editor) for crisp glyphs. Your manuscript text always follows its own script direction, so you can mix Latin and RTL passages freely. RTL translations are a community-improvable Beta; help articles currently stay in English.
help.advanced.languages.title: 言語と右から左へ (RTL)
help.advanced.lora.content: LoRA adapters let a local model learn your personal writing voice without sending a single word to the cloud. Enable “LoRA adapter inference” under 設定 → Early Access Features, then open 設定 → AI → Fine-Tuning to load a pre-trained .safetensors adapter for a compatible WebLLM or Ollama base model. The dedicated LoRA view walks you through dataset extraction, training presets (Writer Style Light → Full Style Clone), and a side-by-side style evaluation. Training runs entirely on your device via a Python sidecar; the adapter influence is tunable with the scale (α) control.
help.advanced.lora.title: LoRA スタイルの微調整
help.advanced.plugins.content: Extend the editor with sandboxed plugins that can only touch the capabilities they declare. Enable “Plugin system” under 設定 → Early Access Features, then manage installed plugins under 設定 → Plugins. Each plugin runs behind a permission-gated API with no direct access to the Redux store, network, or file system beyond what it requests. Reference plugins — a word-count overlay and a scene appender — show the descriptor format.
help.advanced.plugins.title: プラグイン
help.advanced.proforge.content: ProForge is an eight-stage agentic editor that reads your whole manuscript and walks you from structural notes down to copy-edit and proofing. Enable it under 設定 → Early Access Features, then launch it from the AI tools panel in the Writer view. Every stage pauses for your review — the manuscript is never modified without explicit approval, and every change is reversible. A heuristic Supervisor flags low-confidence or fallback results so you can retry a stage with a sharper prompt.
help.advanced.proforge.title: ProForge 編集パイプライン
help.advanced.voice.content: Drive WorldScript Studio hands-free: dictate prose, run commands, and hear AI responses read aloud. Turn on “Voice commands & dictation” under 設定 → Early Access Features, then configure activation (manual button, push-to-talk, or a wake word) under 設定 → Voice & Speech. The default engine uses your browser’s built-in speech with zero downloads; an optional offline Whisper.cpp WASM engine keeps audio fully on-device. All processing stays local unless you explicitly enable a cloud fallback.
help.advanced.voice.title: 音声コントロールとディクテーション
help.aiStudio.critic.content:
AI Critic

Critic ツールは、選択された原稿の一節を読み、ペース、明瞭さ、トーンの 3 つの側面に関する構造化されたフィードバックを返します。これは文法チェッカーではなく、物語の技術を評価します。

  • 使用方法: AI Writing Studio で、批評 タブを選択します。エディターで 1 つ以上の原稿段落を強調表示し、分析 をクリックします。スクラッチパッドには、各ディメンションごとに 1 つの実用的な提案を含む評価付きレポートが表示されます。
  • ペース: 急ぎすぎ（短い文章、急速なシーンのカット）または遅すぎる（競合が少ない長い説明ブロック）と思われるセクションにフラグを立てます。
  • 明瞭さ: あいまいな代名詞の参照、過度にネストされた句、または周囲の散文との語彙の不一致を強調表示します。 style.
  • トーン: トーンのドリフトを検出します。ハイテンションなシーンにコメディの脇が埋め込まれており、それが意図的なものか偶然であるかを示唆します。
  • RAG コンテキスト: RAG コンテキスト が有効になっている場合、批評家は追加の原稿チャンクを受け取るため、選択したパッセージをストーリーの残りの部分と比較し、単一パッセージの分析では見逃してしまう一貫性の問題を見つけることができます。
  • プロバイダー: 同じプロバイダー、モデル、創造性の設定を使用します。 as the Writer.より微妙なフィードバックを得るには、高品質のモデルに切り替えてください。
help.aiStudio.critic.title: AI評論家
help.aiStudio.localAi.content:
Local AI — WebLLM, ONNX, Transformers.js

Run AI models entirely in your browser — no API key, no internet, no data leaves your device. Enable under 設定 → AI → Local AI.

  • WebLLM (GPU): Uses WebGPU to run quantised LLMs (Llama 3.2, Phi-3.5 Mini, Gemma 2). Fast on modern GPUs; requires ~2–6 GB VRAM. Best choice for generation quality.
  • ONNX Runtime (CPU): WASM-based inference, no GPU required. Slower but works on any device. Good for short completions and classification.
  • Transformers.js: Powers the local embedding model used by the hybrid RAG index. Runs automatically; no manual configuration needed.
  • Download a model: Go to 設定 → Advanced AI → Local AI models, pick a model, and click Download. A progress bar tracks the download; large models (2–4 GB) may take several minutes on first load.
  • Switch to local: In the AI Writing Studio toolbar, change the provider to "WebLLM" or "ONNX" before generating. Inference then runs fully offline.
help.aiStudio.localAi.title: ローカル AI (WebLLM / ONNX)
help.aiStudio.overview.content:
Your Creative Co-Pilot

The AI Writing Studio is your dedicated space for AI-assisted writing. The workflow is designed for power and flexibility:

  1. Select Context: First, choose the manuscript section you want to work on from the dropdown menu in the '原稿 Context' panel.
  2. Choose a Tool: Select one of the powerful AI tools from the top of the 'AI Tools' panel.
  3. Provide Input: Depending on the tool, you might need to select text in the editor, choose characters, or write a prompt.
  4. 生成: Click the '生成' button. The output will appear in the 'AI Scratchpad' on the right.
  5. Review and Accept: You can edit the generated text in the scratchpad. Once you're happy, use the 'Insert' or 'Replace' buttons to apply it to your manuscript.
help.aiStudio.overview.title: AIライティングスタジオの概要
help.aiStudio.plotAi.content:
プロットボード AI: Suggest 次へ Beat

The Suggest next beat feature uses your manuscript and outline as context to propose the next scene card for the プロットボード. It is designed for moments when you know a chapter needs "something" but are unsure what.

  • Trigger: Open the プロットボード (enable プロットボード v2 in feature flags first). Click the AI ✦ button in the プロットボード toolbar to open the suggestion panel.
  • How it works: WorldScript assembles a RAG-enriched prompt from your recent manuscript sections, existing beat cards, and your project outline. This context is sent to your configured AI provider.
  • Output: The AI returns a suggested beat title, a short description, and a recommended act placement. A preview card appears in the panel with Accept and Reject buttons.
  • Accept: Clicking Accept creates the beat card on the board in the suggested act column. You can drag it to reposition or edit the title inline.
  • Multiple suggestions: Click Suggest again to get an alternative without accepting the first. Both suggestions appear side-by-side for comparison.
  • Best results: Works best when your manuscript has at least 500 words and existing beat cards have descriptive titles. Enable RAG context in 設定 → Advanced AI for richer retrieval.
help.aiStudio.plotAi.title: プロットボード AI beats
help.aiStudio.providers.content:
AI Providers & API Keys

WorldScript Studio connects to eight AI backends. Configure them under 設定 → AI Models and 設定 → Advanced AI. All API keys are encrypted with AES-256-GCM (PBKDF2 600 000 iterations, SHA-256) before being stored in IndexedDB — they are never transmitted to any WorldScript server.

Cloud Providers

  • Google Gemini (default): Fast, generous free tier. Get a free API key from Google AI Studio. Recommended models: gemini-2.5-flash for everyday use, gemini-2.5-pro for complex generation tasks.
  • OpenAI: GPT-4o and GPT-4o-mini. Enter your OpenAI API key in 設定 → AI → OpenAI key. Strong at instruction-following and prose rewriting.
  • Anthropic (Claude): Claude 3.5 Sonnet and Claude 3 Haiku. Enter your API key from console.anthropic.com. Excellent for long-form narrative and nuanced tone.
  • Grok (xAI): Grok-2 via xAI API. Enter your key from the xAI developer portal. Competitive on creative tasks with a lower cost per token than GPT-4.

Local / Self-Hosted Providers

  • Ollama (local — desktop only): Runs models on your machine via http://localhost:11434. Install Ollama and run ollama pull llama3.2 to get started. The Tauri desktop app bypasses the browser's CSP restriction on localhost connections. Supports any Ollama-compatible model including fine-tuned LoRA adapters.
  • WebLLM (browser, GPU): Runs quantized LLMs in the browser via WebGPU — no API key, no internet required after first download. Supported models: Llama 3.2 1B/3B, Phi-3.5 Mini, Gemma 2 2B. Requires a WebGPU-capable GPU (~2–6 GB VRAM). Download a model under 設定 → Advanced AI → Local AI models.
  • ONNX Runtime Web (browser, CPU): WASM-based inference without a GPU. Slower than WebLLM but works on any device. Good for short completions and classification tasks.
  • Transformers.js (automatic): Powers the local embedding model used by the hybrid RAG index (MiniLM-L6-v2, 384 dimensions). Runs automatically — no configuration needed.

Hybrid Fallback Chain

Under 設定 → Advanced AI → Hybrid fallback chain, define an ordered list of providers. If the primary provider returns a rate-limit or network error, WorldScript automatically retries with the next provider in the chain. This creates a resilient setup — for example: try Gemini first, fall back to OpenAI, fall back to Ollama on desktop.

Creativity Setting

The Creativity slider (0–1) maps to the AI temperature parameter. Use 0.2–0.4 for factual tasks (summaries, consistency checks), 0.5–0.7 for balanced prose continuation, and 0.8–1.0 for brainstorming and highly creative generation.
help.aiStudio.providers.title: AI プロバイダーとキー
help.aiStudio.ragContext.content:
Retrieval-augmented prompts (local)

When RAG context is enabled in the AI Tools panel, WorldScript retrieves relevant manuscript chunks before calling the model. Hybrid mode blends semantic embeddings (~60%), lexical overlap (~30%), and recency (~10%).

  1. Build the index under 設定 → Advanced AI → Rebuild local search index (requires the local embedding model on capable devices).
  2. Open the AI Writing Studio, enable RAG context, and run 続ける, Brainstorm, or Critic.
  3. The chunk badge shows how many passages were injected; プロットボード beat suggestions use the same pipeline.

Your manuscript text stays in the browser; only the assembled prompt is sent to your chosen AI provider.
help.aiStudio.ragContext.title: AI 生成のための RAG コンテキスト
help.aiStudio.tools.content:
The Right Tool for the Job

Each tool in the studio serves a different purpose:

  • 続ける Writing: Perfect for writer's block. Place your cursor in the text, and the AI will write what comes next.
  • Improve Text: Highlight a sentence or paragraph, and the AI will rewrite it. Use the Style dropdown to guide the improvement (e.g., make it more 'Cinematic').
  • Change Tone: Similar to 'Improve Text,' but uses the Tone dropdown to change the mood (e.g., make it more 'Suspenseful').
  • 生成 Dialogue: Select the characters in the scene, describe the scenario, and the AI will write their conversation.
  • Brainstorm Ideas: Get a list of creative plot points for what could happen next.
  • Summarize Section: Quickly generates a synopsis of the selected manuscript section, which is useful for checking pacing or writing chapter summaries.
help.aiStudio.tools.title: AI ツールを理解する
help.analysis.consistency.content:
Consistency Checker

The Consistency Checker scans your manuscript and compares every character and world mention against their dossier details. It catches continuity errors automatically — like a character being described as left-handed in Chapter 1 but right-handed in Chapter 12, or a location appearing after it was destroyed on the timeline.

  • How to run: Navigate to Consistency Checker from the sidebar. Click Run full scan. The scan reads all manuscript sections and cross-references characters, worlds, and the scene timeline.
  • Warning types: Name mismatch (alias used inconsistently), Attribute conflict (a physical or personality trait contradicts the dossier), Timeline violation (a scene references an event before it occurs), Dead character mention (a character marked deceased appears alive in dialogue).
  • Reading a warning: Each warning shows the section title, the offending sentence, and a suggested fix. Click Jump to section to open the 原稿 editor at that exact location.
  • Ignoring warnings: Click Dismiss on a warning to suppress it if the inconsistency is intentional (e.g. an unreliable narrator). Dismissed warnings are hidden until you click Show dismissed.
  • Re-scan after edits: The checker does not update in real time. After fixing an issue, click Run full scan again to clear the resolved warning from the list.
help.analysis.consistency.title: 整合性チェッカー
help.analysis.crossProject.content:
Cross-Project 検索

Find manuscript text, character names, and world details across every project stored in your browser — ideal for series writing or reusing world-building. Enable under 設定 → Experimental flags → Cross-project search.

  • What is indexed: 原稿 section titles and content, character names and descriptions, world names. Images and encrypted keys are never indexed.
  • Index updates: The index rebuilds automatically on each save (debounced). A subtle background indicator appears in the status bar during indexing.
  • Privacy: The index lives entirely in your browser's IndexedDB. Nothing is sent to any server; all search runs locally.
  • How to search: Open the Command Palette (Ctrl+K) and type your query, or open the Cross-Project 検索 panel from the sidebar. Results show project title, section, and a short excerpt. Click a result to open that project at the matching section.
  • Reset the index: 設定 → Data → Rebuild cross-project index if results seem stale after importing a backup.
help.analysis.crossProject.title: プロジェクト間の検索
help.analysis.health.content:
Project Health Score

A blended indicator (0–100) that gives you a quick read on how well-developed your project is. Enable under 設定 → Experimental flags → Project health score.

  • Goal completeness (25%): Whether a word-count goal and target date are set, and how much progress you have made toward them.
  • Cast depth (25%): Average number of filled fields per character profile. Characters with only a name pull the score down; fully described cast members lift it.
  • 世界-building coverage (25%): Ratio of world and location records with descriptions and at least one linked manuscript section.
  • 原稿 consistency (25%): Inverse of open Consistency Checker warnings — fewer warnings, higher sub-score.
  • How to improve: Expand character backstories, add world details, set a goal and target date, and resolve Consistency warnings. Each action moves the dial.
  • Location: The score ring appears on the ダッシュボード when the flag is active. Hover to see the four sub-scores individually.
help.analysis.health.title: プロジェクトの健全性スコア
help.analysis.progress.content:
Progress Tracker

The Progress Tracker view keeps you on course with session tracking, streaks, and historical charts.

  • Session timer: Press Ctrl+Shift+S (or the play button in the progress card) to start a writing session. Stop it to record your word-count delta and session length.
  • Daily & weekly goals: Set targets under 設定 → Writing Goals. The ダッシュボード ring shows today's progress at a glance.
  • Streak: Consecutive-day writing count at the top of the Progress view. Write at least one word on any day to keep the streak alive. Days follow your local timezone.
  • Velocity chart: 30-day rolling bar chart — words written per day. Hover a bar to see the exact count and which session contributed most.
  • 12-week heatmap: A GitHub-style contribution grid for the last 84 days. Darker cells indicate higher-output days.
  • エクスポート history: Click エクスポート CSV in the Progress view to download your full writing history for spreadsheet analysis.
help.analysis.progress.title: 進歩と読みやすさ
help.article.selectPrompt: 左側の記事を選択して読むか、AI アシスタントに助けを求めてください。
help.article.tryItNow: 今すぐ試してください
